## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Story/content update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/CI/automation
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran tests locally (`npm test`).
- [ ] I ran lint/format checks (`npm run lint` and `npm run format:check`).
- [ ] I updated docs where behavior or process changed.
- [ ] I verified no private/sensitive data was added.
- [ ] I reviewed consent/visibility implications for story-related changes.

## Linked Issues

Reference issue(s): `#<number>`

## Screenshots / Evidence (if applicable)

Add UI screenshots, logs, or other proof of behavior here.
